mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsCnvnTrmnatHistDao.selectList */ select bsns_cnvn_trmnat_hist_id , bsns_cnvn_id , to_char(created_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_created_dt , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_TRMNAT_PROCESS_DIV', cnvn_trmnat_process_div_cd) as cnvn_trmnat_process_div_nm /*협약해지처리구분코드명*/ , cnvn_trmnat_process_div_cd , resn_cn , (select member_nm from cmmt_insider where member_id = ubcth.creator_id ) as creator_nm /*처리자명*/ , row_number() over (order by ubcth.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns_cnvn_trmnat_hist ubcth where bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/
